mapper.sql: pewt.header_id as pew_id, pewt.employee_id as pe_id,pewt.company, pewt.post, pewt.start_time, pewt.end_time, pewt.tele, pewt.remarks, pewt.instructions_flag, pewt.check_flag, pewt.enabled_flag, pewt.id, pewt.update_time, pewt.create_by, pewt.create_time, pewt.update_by

${tAlias}.header_id as ${tAlias}_pew_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.company as ${tAlias}_company, ${tAlias}.post as ${tAlias}_post, ${tAlias}.start_time as ${tAlias}_start_time, ${tAlias}.end_time as ${tAlias}_end_time, ${tAlias}.tele as ${tAlias}_tele, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.instructions_flag as ${tAlias}_instructions_flag, ${tAlias}.check_flag as ${tAlias}_check_flag, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_workhistory_temp (header_id, company, post, start_time, end_time, tele, remarks, instructions_flag, check_flag, employee_id, enabled_flag, update_time, create_by, create_time, update_by) values (#{employeeWorkhistory.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_workhistory_temp set header_id = #{employeeWorkhistory.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, company = #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post = #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, tele = #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, instructions_flag = #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, check_flag = #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, employee_id = #{pe.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
